name_en: 💕【New Arrival】Iconic GG Supreme Canvas in the 2025 Early Autumn Collection, reinterpreting the new floral print with a blue tone. This beige and dark brown tri-fold wallet features a modern floral pattern and GG logo.
name_cn:
💕【New Arrival】Iconic GG Supreme Canvas in the 2025 Early Autumn Collection, reinterpreting the new floral print with a blue tone. This beige and dark brown tri-fold wallet features a modern floral pattern and GG logo.
Beige and dark brown GG Supreme canvas
All-over blue floral print
Cloud print fabric lining
Inside: 8 card slots, 1 bill slot
Model: 841146.
Size: 11cm(W) x 9cm(H) (closed); 21cm(W) x 9cm(H) (open)
Weight: approx. 0.11kg
Color: Beige embossed print / Original leather.
Made in Italy
